summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TrustTrade escrow app - both backend APIs and frontend functionality tested with mixed results

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 200 status instead of 401 for invalid/empty tokens
critical_bugs.impact: Security vulnerability - unauthenticated requests not properly blocked

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 200 status code instead of 201 for successful creation
critical_bugs.impact: REST API convention violation - affects client-side success detection

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Invalid response format - expected array but received non-array data
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Admin disputes functionality not working correctly

design_issues.issue: React hydration errors in table components
design_issues.description: HTML structure mismatch causing <tr> and <span> nesting errors in transaction tables

passed_tests: Landing page loads with proper design and navigation
Dashboard displays stats and recent transactions correctly
New transaction creation with auto-calculated 2% fee working
Transactions list shows user's transactions with privacy filter
Admin dashboard accessible to admin users with correct stats
Admin can view all users, transactions in separate tabs
Privacy rules enforced (users see only their data, admin sees all)
All monetary values displayed in Rands (R) format
Authentication flow using test sessions successful
User session management and cookies working
Transaction fee calculation (2% of item price) accurate
Admin stats and overview functionality operational

high_priority: Fix authentication middleware to return 401 for invalid/empty tokens instead of 200
Fix admin disputes endpoint to return proper array format
Resolve React hydration errors in table components (Dashboard, TransactionsList, AdminDashboard)
medium_priority: Update transaction creation endpoint to return 201 status code instead of 200
Review and fix any other REST API status code inconsistencies
